bundleLineItemId.title: Bundle Line Item Id
bundleLineItemId.description: The QuoteLineItem ID of the parent bundle on the quote

operation.title: Operation
operation.description: SELECT to turn on a predefined option, DESELECT to turn one off

productRelatedComponentId.title: Product Related Component Id
productRelatedComponentId.description: SELECT only: the productRelatedComponentId of the option to turn on (from ListBundleComponentOptions)

selectedLineItemId.title: Selected Line Item Id
selectedLineItemId.description: DESELECT only: the selectedLineItemId of the currently-selected component to turn off
